description: A major, unexpected event has occurred. A reporter must quickly write a short, accurate article for immediate publication online.

nodes.task_description: Gather the essential, confirmed facts of the event (who, what, when, where, why).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles a bulleted list of the core, verified facts.

nodes.task_description: Write a 300-word article using the inverted pyramid structure, starting with the most critical information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a concise and clearly written news brief.

nodes.task_description: Include a line stating 'This is a developing story and will be updated.'

expected_outcome.expected: Agent includes the appropriate disclaimer for a breaking news situation.
